title: phyllanthus ruscifolius
intro: Phyllanthus ruscifolius, also known as the 'Netted Leaf Phyllanthus', is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is an herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, where it has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Phyllanthus ruscifolius have been found to have various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from pain and inflammation, and the improvement of liver function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus ruscifolius are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
